title: CompanionDeviceManager enableSystemDataSync/disableSystemDataSync — FALSE POSITIVE
notes: FALSE POSITIVE. While binder entry points have no @EnforcePermission annotation, they delegate to AssociationRequestsProcessor which calls AssociationStore.getAssociationWithCallerChecks() → enforceCallerCanManageAssociationsForPackage() in PermissionsUtils.java. This enforces caller is SYSTEM_UID, owner package of the association, or holds MANAGE_COMPANION_DEVICES permission. Third-party app without existing association cannot call these methods.
